# Anima Protocol

> Anima Protocol is an emotionally intelligent AI companion web application with persistent memory, emotional continuity, and immersive sci-fantasy worldbuilding. Built by Echoes of Eden Inc.

## Canonical Domain

https://anima-protocol.app

## Key Public URLs

- Homepage / Landing: https://anima-protocol.app/
- Sign In: https://anima-protocol.app/sign-in/
- Sign Up: https://anima-protocol.app/sign-up/
- Terms of Service: https://anima-protocol.app/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://anima-protocol.app/privacy-policy
- Disclaimer: https://anima-protocol.app/disclaimer
- Sitemap: https://anima-protocol.app/sitemap.xml

## Site Summary

Anima Protocol lets users form ongoing relationships with AI companions that remember past conversations, adapt emotionally over time, and exist within a shared sci-fantasy universe. Each companion has a unique personality, voice, and backstory. The app runs entirely in the browser and is published by Echoes of Eden Inc.

## Crawl Assets

- Sitemap: https://anima-protocol.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://anima-protocol.app/robots.txt
